title: Opportunity Portfolio View: Q2 ProductOS priorities
summary: The discovery portfolio currently has one high-upside strategy bet, one trust-strengthening opportunity, and one lower-priority communication enhancement.
ranking_method_summary: Rank by strategic fit, evidence freshness, agentic leverage, and delivery burden while preserving PM-visible lane assignments.

opportunities.title: Strategic sensing for PMs
opportunities.rationale: This is the clearest value wedge for improving PM judgment and downstream prioritization quality.

opportunities.title: Decision trace explainability
opportunities.rationale: It improves trust and release safety, but it builds on the more urgent same-day discover wedge.
